name: Haleiwa Joe's
tagline: North Shore's sit-down seafood spot with a chill surfer vibe and solid fresh fish plates.
mustOrder: Fresh catch of the day — grilled or seared, always local fish
Coconut shrimp — crispy and sweet, a crowd favorite
Joe's salad — mixed greens with macadamia nuts and lilikoi dressing
parking: Parking lot at Haleiwa Town Center, right in front of the restaurant.
talkStory: Haleiwa Joe's has been in Haleiwa forever and it's the default 'nice dinner' option on the North Shore. Nothing mind-blowing, but reliably good fish in a laid-back setting. Good for families or when you want something more substantial than a food truck after a beach day. There used to be a Kaneohe location too (Haiku Gardens) — that one closed. The North Shore location is the OG. Sunset time on their patio is a vibe.
